design_philosophy.core_concept: The 'EasyJet' of Taxi - Efficient, Modern, High-Visibility
design_philosophy.visual_style: Swiss Modernism meets Service Utility. High contrast, bold typography, geometric layouts.
design_philosophy.theme_strategy: Navy Blue Dominance with Electric Orange Action. Clean white spaces for readability.

usage_rules: Headings must utilize Chivo Black (900) or Bold (700) for impact.
Use ALL CAPS for labels and small navigational elements to mimic airport signage.
Ensure line-height is tight (leading-none) for display text.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6600] hover:bg-[#E65C00] text-[#001F3F] font-black uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] px-8 py-4 transition-all hover:skew-x-[-10deg] hover:scale-105 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#001F3F]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#001F3F] text-[#001F3F] hover:bg-[#001F3F] hover:text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none px-6 py-3 transition-all

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.feature: bg-slate-50 border-none p-8 rounded-2xl hover:bg-white hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group
cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-6

inputs.default: h-12 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 focus:border-[#FF6600] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF6600] rounded-md font-medium text-[#001F3F] placeholder:text-slate-400 transition-all

navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-[#1E3A5F] hover:text-[#FF6600] transition-colors font-medium

images.description: Black Mercedes Front View - Use for Hero Background with heavy Navy overlay
Professional Driver in Traffic - Use for 'Become a Driver' section
Passenger with Phone - Use for 'Easy Booking' feature
Luxury Interior - Use for 'Premium Comfort' feature

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px, Sharp or Rounded based on context

instructions_to_main_agent: UPDATE /app/frontend/src/index.css root variables to match the new Navy/Orange palette.
REPLACE all yellow (#FFD700) instances with Brand Orange (#FF6600).
REPLACE all black (#09090B) backgrounds with Navy Blue (#001F3F) or Slate 950 (#020617).
UPDATE Button components in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/button.jsx to use the new 'skewed' or 'pill' styles defined in components section.
ENSURE all text on Orange backgrounds is Navy (#001F3F) for contrast.
IMPLEMENT sidebar navigation for Dashboards using the Navy theme.
APPLY data-testid to all interactive elements.

do_not_use: Default Shadcn Card styles without modification
must_use: Smooth transitions for all hover states
